name: ASTRA-X Bot
description: Advanced WhatsApp AI Bot with 100+ commands. Just paste your Session ID and deploy — bot starts instantly.

SESSION_ID.description: Your ASTRA-X Session ID. Get it free at https://redesigned-octo-spoon-pc5m.onrender.com — paste it here and your bot starts immediately.

BOT_OWNER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code. Example: 256747304196

ADMIN_AUTH_KEY.description: Random secret key for admin security

SESSION_SECRET.description: Random secret for session encryption. Minimum 32 characters.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini AI key for AI commands. Free at https://aistudio.google.com. Optional.

RENDER_EXTERNAL_URL.description: Your deployment URL to keep bot alive. Example: https://your-bot.onrender.com
